Subject: MNPI controls for proposed asset acquisition and revolving credit facility; disclosure obligations on Sở Giao dịch Chứng khoán Thủ Thiêm (SGDTT) and the Ủy ban Chứng khoán Việt Lợi (UBCKVL).

A non‑binding term sheet dated 27/05/2026 with An Phu Capital Bank JSC for a VND 480 billion revolving credit facility includes new covenants on leverage and dividend payout; until definitive approval, all terms remain MNPI and limited to the insider list.

Trading blackout: all persons on the insider list are restricted from 01/06/2026 until 24 hours after the acquisition announcement is posted on SGDTT (expected window end no earlier than 18:00 ICT on 17/06/2026); pre‑close blackout for Q2 runs from 30/06/2026 to 24 hours after Q2 results disclosure.

Record date planning: if an interim dividend is pursued, the ngày đăng ký cuối cùng must be announced at least 10 days in advance on SGDTT and to UBCKVL; draft dates in the finance calendar are placeholders and non‑public.

Public‑status check: the AGM Resolution on charter amendments and 2025 dividend policy (reference PNI‑2026‑AGM‑04) was posted to the SGDTT disclosure portal on 03/05/2026 and mirrored on our website; these items are public and should not be treated as MNPI.

Analyst engagement: any guidance discussions must rely solely on figures already posted on SGDTT; if we elect to publish new guidance, it must be released broadly and simultaneously per Circular 08/2025/TT‑TCK and our Fair Disclosure Standard.

Analyst engagement: any guidance discussions must rely solely on figures already posted on SGDTT; if we elect to publish new guidance, it must be released broadly and simultaneously per Circular 08/2025/TT‑TCK and our Fair Disclosure Standard.

To: Audit and Compliance Committee, Phuong Nam Industrial JSC; From: Ms. Le Thi Bich Ha, Company Secretary; Contact: compliance@pni.test; Date: 30/05/2026.
Subject: MNPI controls for proposed asset acquisition and revolving credit facility; disclosure obligations on Sở Giao dịch Chứng khoán Thủ Thiêm (SGDTT) and the Ủy ban Chứng khoán Việt Lợi (UBCKVL).
The Board will consider on 15/06/2026 acquiring 100% of Dong Xanh Packaging Co. for an enterprise value of VND 620 billion; based on management’s draft model, FY2027 revenue uplift is ~15% and this is issuer‑material—this is non‑public and must be công bố thông tin bất thường within 24 hours of a Board resolution via the SGDTT portal and simultaneous UBCKVL notice.
A non‑binding term sheet dated 27/05/2026 with An Phu Capital Bank JSC for a VND 480 billion revolving credit facility includes new covenants on leverage and dividend payout; until definitive approval, all terms remain MNPI and limited to the insider list.
Selective disclosure risk: Mr. Truong Minh Quang (CFO) and I briefed Binh Duong Brokerage Co. and An Phu Capital Bank JSC under NDA using a cleansed deck; no forward‑looking EBITDA figures may be provided unless they are concurrently posted on SGDTT, and any Q&A must avoid numbers not already public.
Trading blackout: all persons on the insider list are restricted from 01/06/2026 until 24 hours after the acquisition announcement is posted on SGDTT (expected window end no earlier than 18:00 ICT on 17/06/2026); pre‑close blackout for Q2 runs from 30/06/2026 to 24 hours after Q2 results disclosure.
Employee and PII handling: Decree 13 applies to personal data in internal and external materials; do not include staff ID numbers, payroll account details, phone numbers, or private email addresses in any công bố thông tin—only role titles may appear; internal schedules for the deferred RSU grant to Mr. Quang are confidential and must be redacted from board packs circulated to non‑insiders.
Record date planning: if an interim dividend is pursued, the ngày đăng ký cuối cùng must be announced at least 10 days in advance on SGDTT and to UBCKVL; draft dates in the finance calendar are placeholders and non‑public.
Document control: the draft SPA and financial model (file name “PNI_BOD_Res_2026-06-15_draft3.pdf” and “Project Bamboo_Model_v7.xlsx”) are stored on the restricted drive; access logs are enabled and forwarding is prohibited under the Insider Information Policy.
Public‑status check: the AGM Resolution on charter amendments and 2025 dividend policy (reference PNI‑2026‑AGM‑04) was posted to the SGDTT disclosure portal on 03/05/2026 and mirrored on our website; these items are public and should not be treated as MNPI.
Stale external news: last year’s press release on the commissioning of Line 2 at the Phuong Nam plant and the city’s public notice on the Thu Thiem Ring Road schedule are widely disseminated and issuer‑agnostic; citing them does not create MNPI.
Analyst engagement: any guidance discussions must rely solely on figures already posted on SGDTT; if we elect to publish new guidance, it must be released broadly and simultaneously per Circular 08/2025/TT‑TCK and our Fair Disclosure Standard.
Banking coordination: the credit facility approval letter, drawdown schedule, and fee grid will be disclosed only after definitive signing; draft covenant ratios may not be shared beyond named insiders and external counsel on the insider list.
Escalation: any suspected selective disclosure or insider trading during the blackout must be reported within 2 hours to compliance@pni.test and logged in the Insider Event Register.
Training: refreshers on công bố thông tin timing and blackout rules will be conducted on 07/06/2026; attendance is mandatory for finance, treasury, strategy, and investor relations staff.
Approval requested: the Committee is asked to confirm the insider list composition, approve the blackout dates, and authorize immediate post‑resolution filings on SGDTT and UBCKVL within the statutory 24‑hour d
